claims.source_quote: byte[] derived = derive(password, Base64.getDecoder().decode(saltBase64), iterations, KEY_LENGTH_BITS);

claims.statement: deriveEncryptionKey derives key bytes by calling derive with password, decoded salt, iterations, and KEY_LENGTH_BITS.
claims.source_quote: byte[] derived = derive(password, Base64.getDecoder().decode(saltBase64), iterations, KEY_LENGTH_BITS);

claims.statement: deriveEncryptionKey returns a SecretKeySpec using the AES algorithm.

entities.name: deriveEncryptionKey
entities.description: Method that derives an AES encryption key from a password and salt.

entities.name: decode
entities.description: Method call used to decode Base64 text.

entities.name: derive
entities.description: Method that derives key bytes from a password and salt.

entities.name: getDecoder
entities.description: Method call used to obtain a Base64 decoder.

relations.description: deriveEncryptionKey calls getDecoder to obtain a Base64 decoder.
deriveEncryptionKey calls decode to decode the salt.
deriveEncryptionKey calls derive to compute key bytes.
